query:
INSERT INTO workshops (slug, title, titleZh, category, description, descriptionZh, durationMinutes, maxParticipants, priceEur, depositPercent, location, imageUrl, isActive) VALUES
('calligraphy-intro', 'Calligrafia Cinese — Introduzione', '漢字書法入門', 'calligraphy', 'Discover the art of Chinese calligraphy in a 2-hour hands-on session. Learn basic strokes, brush control, and write your first characters under expert guidance.', '在兩小時的實作課程中探索漢字書法藝術。學習基本筆畫、毛筆控制，並在專家指導下書寫你的第一個漢字。', 120, 10, 65.00, 50, 'Via Indipendenza 8, Bologna', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663051147795/rgyUQfdKTgRPNsEk.png', true),
('ink-painting-plum', 'Pittura a Inchiostro — Fiori di Pruno', '水墨畫：梅花', 'ink', 'Learn the meditative art of Chinese ink painting. Paint plum blossoms using traditional techniques — brush pressure, ink dilution, and negative space.', '學習中國水墨畫的冥想藝術。使用傳統技法繪製梅花——筆壓、墨水稀釋與留白。', 150, 8, 75.00, 50, 'Via Indipendenza 8, Bologna', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663051147795/fJQLNNktTOZKWVkY.png', true),
('tea-ceremony-dadaocheng', 'Cerimonia del Tè — Stile Dadaocheng', '大稻埕茶道體驗', 'tea', 'Experience a traditional Taiwanese tea ceremony inspired by the historic Dadaocheng tea culture. Learn gongfu cha technique and taste premium Taiwanese teas.', '體驗以大稻埕歷史茶文化為靈感的台灣傳統茶道。學習功夫茶技藝，品嚐頂級台灣茶。', 90, 12, 45.00, 50, 'Via Indipendenza 8, Bologna', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663051147795/moKMdnvvYcKhiErW.png', true);

INSERT INTO workshop_sessions (workshopId, sessionDate, spotsTotal, spotsBooked, isActive) VALUES
(1, '2026-03-15 10:00:00', 10, 3, true),
(1, '2026-03-22 14:00:00', 10, 1, true),
(1, '2026-04-05 10:00:00', 10, 0, true),
(2, '2026-03-20 10:00:00', 8, 2, true),
(2, '2026-04-10 14:00:00', 8, 0, true),
(3, '2026-03-18 16:00:00', 12, 5, true),
(3, '2026-03-25 16:00:00', 12, 2, true),
(3, '2026-04-08 16:00:00', 12, 0, true);
